problem: How to restore depleted agricultural soil microbiome rapidly at scale?
hypothesis: If Electrocoagulation for suspended particle removal is applied to rapidly, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Mesocosm controlled study with 5 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Nature uses only the longest threads to weave her patterns. — Richard Feynman
